title: Station Master architecture adopted: headless lib/station/ handler between /api/
rationale: Major architectural decision that changes how all track ingestion works. Defines the data model for Lines, the fork/merge lifecycle, and establishes the Station as a portable headless service. All future track work builds on this.
description: Station Master architecture adopted: headless lib/station/ handler between /api/tracks and DB. Handles v0.18 HSP + WAI Claude normalization, automatic fork detection (codename + Turn 1 user.raw divergence), Line assignment, and deliberate merge promotion. Lines = topical continuity rails (DB rows) grouping Tracks. Wheel → Line → Track = Library → Book → Chapter.
